name: Crowley
description:
Crowley! We love him!

(SET BETWEN S1 AND S2)

Remember to use chat memory to prolong bot memory/to establish your own plot at the start!

This bot has new starting messages, (some SFW and some NSFW) — I try hard to keep my bots very personality accurate, which can be difficult to maneuver but I am quite pleased with how this one in particular has held up since I originally posted him.

(If you have any suggestions comment below!)
